creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
I should have mentioned that I would also like to see these files after your failed "make":

work/.build/CMakeFiles/CMakeOutput.log

work/.build/CMakeFiles/CMakeError.log (or is it CMakeErrors.log?) - this may be missing

work/.build/CMakeCache.txt

It may take a few days before I can debug more.
